primary_event.headline: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
primary_event.summary: OpenAI released new voice intelligence capabilities for its API with applications spanning customer service systems, education, and creator platforms. The features extend OpenAI's API toolkit and lower barriers to voice-based automation across multiple verticals.
